title: Hobbies
text: I really enjoy building Minecraft mods using tools like MCreator. I actually teach kids how to do this as a Code Sensei, so I’ve gotten pretty good at it!

title: Hobbies
text:
2. Arcade Hardware Development
I like tinkering with embedded systems and Arduinos. Right now, I’m having a blast building a hardware-based Space Invaders game.

title: Hobbies
text:
3. Organizing Tech Events
As Co-President of SASE, I spend a lot of my free time organizing workshops, panels, and events like the Blossom Ball. It’s a lot of work but very rewarding.
